diagrams.title: Distributed System Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how multiple independent computers connect via network and appear as single coherent system to users
elements: User Interface Layer (appearing as single system)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how distributed systems present unified view despite underlying complexity

diagrams.title: Client-Server Model
diagrams.description: Diagram showing client-server interaction in distributed systems
diagrams.purpose: Understand the fundamental interaction pattern in distributed computing

diagrams.title: Categories of Distributed Systems
diagrams.description: Shows three main categories and their sub-types
diagrams.purpose: Classify different types of distributed systems based on application domain
